name: Magnesium sulfate (MgSO4)
description: CNS depressant da anticonvulsant amfani da rigakafi da kuma lura da eclamptic seizures (seizure a ciki daga pre-eclampsia). Hakanan ana amfani dashi don asma mai tsanani da torsades de pointes. Layin farko don eclampsia akan benzodiazepines.
indications: Eclampsia (kariyar rigakafin kamuwa da cuta a cikin matsanancin pre-eclampsia)
Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach daga hypomagnesemia)
dose: Adadin lodin Eclampsia: 4-6g IV jinkirin turawa sama da mintuna 20. Kulawa: 1-2g / awa IV jiko. Idan kamawa ya sake faruwa: 2-4g IV sama da mintuna 5. IM loading (idan babu IV): 5g IM kowane gindi (jimlar 10g) a lokaci guda.
window: Fara a farkon kamawa ko kuma a gano ainihin abubuwan pre-eclampsia mai tsanani.
contraindications: Rashin gazawar koda (yana tara -- rage kashi)
warnings: Alamun guba: asarar patellar reflex (alamar farko, 7-10 mEq / L), damuwa na numfashi (> 10 mEq / L), kama zuciya (> 15 mEq / L).
Saka idanu patellar reflexes kowane minti 15 -- asarar reflex = dakatar da jiko.
antidote don guba: Calcium gluconate 1g IV sama da mintuna 3.
Rage kashi a cikin raunin koda -- saka idanu da fitowar fitsari.

pediatric.dose: Torsades: 25-50 mg/kg IV akan 10-20 min (max 2g). Tsananin asma: 25-75 mg/kg IV (max 2g).
pediatric.note: Ba kasafai ake amfani da shi ba don kamewa a cikin marasa lafiya na yara marasa haihuwa - eclampsia shine alamar farko.

obstetric.note: Alamar farko. Ketare placenta - hypermagnesemia na jariri yana yiwuwa. Adadin jarirai idan bakin ciki na numfashi: calcium gluconate 100 mg/kg IV. Sanar da ƙungiyar NICU game da amfani da magnesium na uwa.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
